assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> renders the octocats returned from the API.
assertionResults.title: renders the octocats returned from the API.

assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> renders an 'Add to collection' Button for each octocat when not logged in.
assertionResults.title: renders an 'Add to collection' Button for each octocat when not logged in.

assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> redirects user to login page if Octocat is added while logged out.
assertionResults.title: redirects user to login page if Octocat is added while logged out.

assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> renders a 'Remove form collection' button if octocat belongs to user.
assertionResults.title: renders a 'Remove form collection' button if octocat belongs to user.

assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> adds given cat to user if clicked on add button.
assertionResults.title: adds given cat to user if clicked on add button.

assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> removes Octocat from users collection if clicked on remove button
assertionResults.title: removes Octocat from users collection if clicked on remove button

assertionResults.fullName: <Home /> removes mark of all owned cats if user logs out.
assertionResults.title: removes mark of all owned cats if user logs out.

assertionResults.fullName: <Login /> redirects to '/' after a sucessful login.
assertionResults.title: redirects to '/' after a sucessful login.

assertionResults.fullName: <Login /> shows error message if username / password is wrong.
assertionResults.title: shows error message if username / password is wrong.

assertionResults.fullName: <Login /> shows server error if auth server is not reachable.
assertionResults.title: shows server error if auth server is not reachable.

assertionResults.fullName: <Login /> shows general error if api returns unknown error.
assertionResults.title: shows general error if api returns unknown error.
